Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Aethertech]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — Zenith Devices are the original Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Aethertech can be of masterwork quality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Aethertech is a technology that cannot be hacked by standard means.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Aethertech was granted to the Karoshan commander for his hunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The console at the bottom of the tunnel is likely Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Aethertech is a technology capable of hacking processor implants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Aethertech is used to create prosthetics.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — Aethertech can be used to alter a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — Aethertech refers to the type of body Omega possesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — The starship's atmosphere is held in place by magic or Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Aethertech components can be complex and intricate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Iron King has a masterwork Aethertech device attached to his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Iron King's Aethertech device resembles an obsidian cage filled with screaming mechanical faces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Aethertech device was designed to anchor the Iron King's mind and spirit to the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 20''' — Aethertech is a technology used in Subspace storage devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — The assassin has a molten orange cybernetic eye made of Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — Aethertech is a technology used in Omega's eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Aethertech is the technology used to create Titans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — The ship utilizes ancient Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — Aethertech armor provides little protection against violations of reality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — The vault cells utilize Aethertech for enchantment and containment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 43''' — The Fallen Sword uses an Aethertech weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 46''' — The King's pink-tinged flames might be produced by Aethertech.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — Sola Kalter's armor is made of Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — Moonmaster's powers come from embedded Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — Aethertech is a technology used in Moonmaster's implants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — Aethertech is a technology that can grant special abilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Master Aethertech provides Starhammer with his powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Aethertech is a technology used for modifications on individuals like Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Aethertech is a technology characterized by an alien structure and the use of Aetheric symbols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Steel Avalanche's lack of apparent armor was an effect of his Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Mell runs her hand over the surface of the Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — Sola's armor is described as masterwork Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — Aethertech is a type of gift or technology used by Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Queen Shyrax's gift can improve the performance of Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 27''' — Aethertech is technology that interacts with magic spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Aethertech refers to advanced technology used on the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Aethertech is the technology that provides Starhammer with his powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — The Aethertech in Raion's hydraulic press has a minor gravity manipulation effect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Advanced Aethertech works on principles beyond the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 37''' — Sola's visor contains Aethertech that can be strained.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — The Lichborn's swords might be Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 49''' — Aethertech engines maintain the metal rings that contain Estrala's atmosphere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Omega possesses an orange Aethertech eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 53''' — The Last Horizon contains stitched-together Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Aethertech is embedded within a man-sized column of glass in Horizon's treasure vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Lutoch's processor is described as cutting-edge Aethertech.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Aethertech is used in physical augmentations like Kyri's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — Sola's suit utilizes Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Aethertech refers to reusable devices or technology within the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — The Titan Forge is a piece of Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Aethertech requires precision in magic casting to sync with it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — The Titan Forge has arms made of Aethertech chrome.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — Aethertech is the technology used for Titans and starfighters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Omega uses an orange handgun from a Subspace pocket that is Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Aethertech can potentially interfere with magical seals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — The Titan contains Aethertech devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Aethertech components were visible within the destroyed plates of the Red Titan.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — Aethertech is a type of magical skill or technology.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — Unknown Aethertech was used to target the ship from within the system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Materials can be used for constructing Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — High-grade Aethertech could be used to stop teleportation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Omega is not an Aether Technician.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Mell mentions self-upgrading Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 33''' — Aethertech is a technology visible through the seams of Aila's artificial skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Veshran wears a circlet made of Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Aethertech enhancements allow Benri's clones to leave a body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Aethertech was stolen and brought to the planet Zykaros.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 41''' — Omega uses Aethertech in his ears.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
